query: SELECT id, claim_id, estimated_cost, confidence_score, fraud_risk_level, fraud_score_breakdown_json, total_loss_indicated, repair_to_value_ratio, structural_damage_severity, created_at FROM ai_assessments WHERE claim_id = 2640001 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT id, claim_id, estimated_cost, confidence_score, fraud_risk_level, fraud_score_breakdown_json, total_loss_indicated, repair_to_value_ratio, structural_damage_severity, created_at FROM ai_assessments WHERE claim_id = 2640001 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;

rows.fraud_score_breakdown_json: {"overallScore":45,"level":"medium","indicators":[{"indicator":"excessive_damage_count","category":"pattern","score":15,"description":"Unusually high number of damaged components (31)."},{"indicator":"high_cost_per_component","category":"financial","score":15,"description":"Average cost per damaged component (16864.90) exceeds typical range."},{"indicator":"no_damage_photos","category":"documentation","score":15,"description":"No damage photographs provided with the claim."}],"damageConsistency":{"score":50,"notes":"High component count may indicate pre-existing damage."}}
